end G=#v return V(f)end,{},function(h,E)local V=d(E)local J=function(J,x,v,A,f)return G(h,{J;x;v;A,f},E,V)end return J end return(C(738755+3716559,{}))(V(f))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or
